data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of 'Provider review and flagging of responses'. However, while the linked use case mentions that the provider reviews submissions and flags them, there is no concrete evidence provided that demonstrates the actual implementation of this functionality. The evidence does not confirm that the system allows for the flagging of responses in a manner that meets the requirement, indicating a gap in the requirement coverage.
gaps: No concrete evidence of the implementation of provider review and flagging of responses.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add evidence of provider review functionality
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Verify that the API allows providers to review and flag responses.
